steps.title: Vieta shortcut: product of roots = c/a
steps.content: For $x^2 + 10x - 80 = 0$, identify $a = 1$, $c = -80$. No need to factor or use the quadratic formula.

steps.title: Compute
steps.content: $\frac{c}{a} = \frac{-80}{1} = -80$. A is correct. The shortcut works because the quadratic is monic, so the constant term is exactly the product of the two roots.
